Apple.news: Apple announced Apple Intelligence powered accessibility feature updates. WWDC 2026 confirmed for June 9 (Beijing Time).

NVIDIA.news: Q1 FY2027 financial results call scheduled for May 20, 2026. Focus on Blackwell demand and AI infrastructure.

Huawei.news: Huawei Mate 80 and Pura 80 series confirmed to support 3D image wallpapers starting June.

Alibaba.news: Quark Cloud Drive launched new SVIP subscription plans.

ByteDance.news: Focusing on AI-integrated video and search experiences.

Honor.news: World's first 'Robot Phone' expected to launch in Q3. Pushing 'Dragonfly' AI Agent matrix.

Xiaomi.news: Xiaomi YU7 GT set a new Nurburgring SUV lap record. Xiaomi 17 Max features 8000mAh Jinshajiang battery.

Google.news: Google I/O 2026 launched Gemini 3.5 Flash (4x faster than GPT-5.5). Gemini 3.5 Pro announced for June release.

Anthropic.news: Partnering with xAI (SpaceXAI) for compute. Launched Claude Security for enterprise codebase scanning.

OpenAI.news: Musk v. Altman legal proceedings revealing internal board conflicts regarding ChatGPT launch and Helion deal. xAI (SpaceXAI) compute partnership with Anthropic announced.

Nintendo.news: Mandalorian movie tie-ins and Switch 2 launch titles expected in May/June.

Samsung.news: Discontinuing TV sales in China due to domestic competition. Galaxy Ring 2 development reported with 10-day battery life (expected 2027).
